nav.banner_text: MVS Workshop from €2,000 — find out in 30 min if DVEsolutions is right for you.

hero.subheadline: We take your idea from blank page to testable prototype in 2 weeks — and to a live product in 6. With AI, no waste, no agency that doesn't understand your business.
hero.cta_primary: See if DVEsolutions is right for you

pain.headline: Do you recognize your problem?
pain.card1_hook: I have a strong idea. I've been planning for 6 months.
pain.card1_body: You're building decks instead of product. The market doesn't wait for your perfect roadmap.
pain.card2_hook: The devs I find don't understand my business.
pain.card2_body: You've already paid, waited, explained from scratch. And you're still at square one.
pain.card3_hook: 2 months with an agency. Zero startup context.
pain.card3_body: Burn rate doesn't wait. Every week without a product is cash burned.

method.headline: We're not an agency. We're not a freelancer.
method.subheadline: We're a 2-person team + AI working like an in-house CTO — without the hiring cost.
method.step2_desc: Interactive prototype + user testing. Delivered in 2 weeks

process.headline: What you get, when.
process.week1_desc: Problem analysis, strategy and project document ready to go.
process.week2_desc: Interactive prototype validated with real users. You already know what works.
process.week3_desc: MVP online, your code, documentation included. 1 month of support.

pricing.headline: Full transparency. No surprises.

footer.tagline: From idea to MVP in 6 weeks.

hero.subtitle: Agent Lead qualifies your visitors in real time, collects their information and delivers only purchase-ready leads.
hero.note: 14 days free · no credit card · setup in 5 minutes

pain.card1_body: Nobody fills out forms in 2026. Your visitors want instant answers, not 10-field forms.
pain.card2_body: By the time you read the form email, the lead has already found a competitor. Every minute counts.
pain.card3_hook: You don't know who's worth contacting
pain.card3_body: You waste time calling tire-kickers. An AI agent qualifies who's ready to buy and who's not.

how.step1_title: Paste the tag on your site
how.step1_desc: A single JavaScript snippet. Copy, paste, done. Works with any website.
how.step2_title: The agent chats with your visitors
how.step2_desc: The AI widget responds in real time, understands what they're looking for and collects the info you need.
how.step3_desc: No spam. Only purchase-ready contacts, with all the info in your CRM.

cases.restaurant_desc: Automatic reservations, menu info, event management.
cases.agency_desc: Project qualification, automatic quotes, call booking.
cases.saas_desc: Demo booking, pricing info, assisted onboarding.

hero_chat.bot1: Hi! 👋 How can I help you today?
hero_chat.user1: I'd like to know more about your services
hero_chat.bot2: Sure! We offer customized solutions. What's your industry?
hero_chat.bot3: Great! I'll send you a personalized proposal. What's your email?

restaurant_chat.bot1: Hi! 👋 Want to book a table or have questions about the menu?
restaurant_chat.user1: I'd like to book for Saturday evening, 4 people
restaurant_chat.bot2: Perfect! For Saturday evening I have availability at 7:30 PM and 9:00 PM. Which do you prefer?
restaurant_chat.user2: 9:00 PM works. The name is Marco Rossi
restaurant_chat.bot3: Booking confirmed! Marco Rossi, Saturday 9 PM, 4 people. What email should I send confirmation to?

ecommerce_chat.bot1: Hi! Can I help you find the right product?
ecommerce_chat.user1: Looking for a gift for my wife, budget 50-80€
ecommerce_chat.bot2: Great choice! I recommend our 'Essentials' collection. Want me to show the top 3 sellers?
ecommerce_chat.bot3: Here's the top 3: 1) Skincare set €65 2) Canvas bag €72 3) Candle box €55. Want the direct link?

agency_chat.bot1: Hi! Are you looking for support with a digital project?
agency_chat.user1: Yes, we need a website redesign
agency_chat.bot2: Got it. What type of company are you and how many pages does your current site have?
agency_chat.user2: Law firm, about 15 pages. We want something more modern
agency_chat.bot3: For a 15-page redesign, our projects start from €3,000. Can I have a project manager contact you?

saas_chat.bot1: Hi! Want to learn how our platform works?
saas_chat.user1: Yes, how much for a team of 20?
saas_chat.bot2: For teams of 20, the Team plan is €199/month. Includes all integrations. Any specific needs?
saas_chat.bot3: Salesforce is included in the Team plan! Want to book a 15-minute demo?

professional_chat.bot1: Hello! How can I help you?
professional_chat.user1: I need tax consulting for my freelance business
professional_chat.bot2: Sure. Are you a freelancer or do you have a company? How long have you been operating?
professional_chat.bot3: For flat-rate we offer consulting + filing at €400/year. Would you like to book a free intro call?

realestate_chat.bot1: Hi! Looking to buy/rent or sell a property?
realestate_chat.user1: Looking for a 1-bedroom rental in Milan, max €1,200
realestate_chat.bot2: I have 3 apartments available: Navigli, Isola, and Porta Romana areas. Want the details?
realestate_chat.bot3: Isola apartment: 55sqm, €1,100/month, available immediately. Leave your number to schedule a viewing!
